suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-07-07 False positive: CVE-2026-54515 applies to jackson libraries. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - jackson-databind 2.22.0 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-18 False positive: CVE-2025-7962 applies to angus-activation. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - angus-activation 2.0.3 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-07-07 False positive: CVE-2026-54399 and CVE-2026-54428 applies to httpcore libraries. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - httpcore 4.4.16 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.
